resolution_definition: resolved = domain answered DNS AND >=1 of {SPF,DKIM,DMARC,MTA-STS,TLS-RPT,BIMI} observable (maturity_score>0)
universe_unit_note: 915 designations span 909 distinct RUTs; 6 entities hold multi-sector designations
